steps.title: Calculate the monthly return amount
steps.content:
The company sold 1,300,000 units in the first month with a 15% return rate. Find how many units are returned each month:
$$\text{Monthly returns} = 0.15 \times 1,300,000 = 195,000$$

steps.title: Multiply by 6 months
steps.content:
Since both sales volume and return rate remain the same, the total returns over the 6-month period (the first month plus the next 5 months) is:
$$\text{Total returns} = 195,000 \times 6 = 1,170,000$$
That confirms C is correct.
